name: openclaw-code-index
description: GitNexus-backed OpenClaw code intelligence for Codex Desktop agents and subagents.

interface.longDescription: OpenClaw Code Index connects Codex Desktop agents to GitNexus and provides OpenClaw-specific guidance for querying, tracing, and impact-checking upstream OpenClaw safely.
defaultPrompt: Use OpenClaw Code Index to explain this path
Check GitNexus impact before editing this symbol
Find the OpenClaw execution flow for this behavior
